generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and someone who cares about safety, I've been thinking about how we balance security and freedom. The recent attacks show we can't afford to be naive. Our agencies need better tools to stop threats before they happen. Yes, some civil liberties debates are messy, but isn't it our duty to protect what we value? The alternative is chaos. #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurFamilies
